dataset: ReqView ExampleProject (DEMO) — official sample project by Eccam s.r.o.

pi_items.source: Live environment verification: ls confirmed directory exists at this path with project.json and documents/ subdirectory containing all 7 document JSON files.
Live environment verification: successfully wrote and read back a JSON file at this path as user ga. Directory /home/ga/Documents/ is owned by ga:ga and writable.

Parsed ARCH.json from live environment. Found 18 total items in the data array; exactly 9 have non-empty links.implementation arrays: ARCH-18 (Application), ARCH-8 (Widgets), ARCH-9 (Actions), ARCH-10 (Dialogs), ARCH-14 (Export), ARCH-13 (Import), ARCH-16 (File), ARCH-12 (Models), ARCH-15 (Persistency).
Summed all implementation link arrays across 9 ARCH components from parsed ARCH.json: 2+35+35+1+2+3+4+38+3 = 123 total SRS references.

Parsed TESTS.json from live environment. Only 6 TESTS items have verification links: TESTS-4 (verifies SRS-56), TESTS-5 (SRS-59), TESTS-21 (SRS-53,106,107,114,115,116), TESTS-22 (SRS-108,109,110,111,112), TESTS-29 (SRS-119,120,121,122,157,165,191,192,193), TESTS-30 (SRS-132,133,96,97,98,90). Union = 28 unique SRS IDs.
Computed from cross-referencing ARCH implementation links against TESTS verification links. No single ARCH component has ALL its implemented SRS requirements verified by tests.
ARCH-8 Widgets (8/35 = 23%), ARCH-9 Actions (13/35 = 37%), ARCH-16 File (2/4 = 50%), ARCH-12 Models (20/38 = 53%). Each has some but not all SRS requirements tested.
ARCH-18 Application (0/2), ARCH-10 Dialogs (0/1), ARCH-14 Export (0/2), ARCH-13 Import (0/3), ARCH-15 Persistency (0/3). None of their implemented SRS requirements have test verification links.
Sum of tested_srs counts per component: 0+8+13+0+0+0+2+20+0 = 43. Note: some SRS IDs appear in multiple ARCH components, so this counts link-level references, not unique SRS IDs.
Sum of untested_srs counts per component: 2+27+22+1+2+3+2+18+3 = 80. Total references = 43+80 = 123, consistent with total SRS references.

pi_items.verified_value: String references like 'SRS-174', not {docId, reqId} objects
pi_items.source: Parsed ARCH.json directly. Implementation links are stored as string arrays, e.g. links.implementation: ['SRS-174', 'SRS-195']. This differs from some other ReqView documents that use object format.

pi_items.verified_value: String references like 'SRS-53', not {docId, reqId} objects
pi_items.source: Parsed TESTS.json directly. Verification links use same string format, e.g. links.verification: ['SRS-56'].

pi_items.verified_value: Top-level key is 'data' (a list), not 'children'. Items have nested 'children' arrays.
pi_items.source: Parsed ARCH.json, SRS.json, TESTS.json. All use data[] at root with recursive children[] for hierarchy. Top-level keys include: id, guid, name, lastId, data, attributes, views, metadata.

pi_items.verified_value: ReqView displays reverse links in the Links panel. SRS-53 in JSON only has links.satisfaction to NEEDS-58, but the GUI Links panel also shows 'Is implemented by: ARCH-9' and 'Is verified by: TESTS-21' as reverse lookups.
pi_items.source: Live GUI verification: selected SRS-53 and observed Links panel showing Satisfies (NEEDS-58), Is implemented by (ARCH-9), Is verified by (TESTS-21). Only satisfaction link exists in SRS.json for SRS-53.

privileged_info_summary: The ReqView ExampleProject ARCH document contains exactly 9 components with implementation links to SRS requirements: ARCH-18 Application (2 SRS refs), ARCH-8 Widgets (35), ARCH-9 Actions (35), ARCH-10 Dialogs (1), ARCH-14 Export (2), ARCH-13 Import (3), ARCH-16 File (4), ARCH-12 Models (38), ARCH-15 Persistency (3), totaling 123 SRS references. The TESTS document has only 6 items with verification links covering 28 unique SRS IDs: TESTS-4 verifies SRS-56; TESTS-5 verifies SRS-59; TESTS-21 verifies SRS-53,106,107,114,115,116; TESTS-22 verifies SRS-108,109,110,111,112; TESTS-29 verifies SRS-119,120,121,122,157,165,191,192,193; TESTS-30 verifies SRS-132,133,96,97,98,90. The correct summary is: 0 fully covered components, 4 partially covered (Widgets 23%, Actions 37%, File 50%, Models 53%), 5 zero coverage (Application, Dialogs, Export, Import, Persistency), 43 overall tested references, 80 overall untested references. The agent must navigate between ARCH, SRS, and TESTS documents using the project tree and Links panel. When an ARCH component is selected, the Links panel shows its 'Implements' links to SRS items. When an SRS item is selected, the Links panel shows 'Is verified by' reverse links from TESTS items. The output JSON must be written to /home/ga/Documents/arch_test_coverage.json. The agent can open a terminal (gnome-terminal or xterm are available) to write the JSON file programmatically.
